source_label: Wiktionary ‚ÄĒ Romanian given name "Ion", IPA /iňąon/ (equivalent to English "John")
notes: Romanian-American Berkeley professor: co-creator of Apache Spark, Mesos and Ray, co-founder of Databricks and Anyscale, and head of the Sky Computing Lab behind vLLM and Chatbot Arena. "Ion" is not the chemistry word ‚ÄĒ it is the Romanian form of "John", /iňąon/, so "ee-OHN" and not "EYE-on". The surname is "STOY-kuh": the "oi" is a single diphthong (the name goes back to Bulgarian Stoyko), not "sto-EE-ka" or "STOH-ik-uh".
